entry.title: Re: Problem in SAP Commerce 2211.32 at startup during spr...
entry.content:
Also, you can do the following override in your facades-spring file

<alias name="defaultSAPOrderGenericPaymentInfoPopulator" alias="sapOrderGenericPaymentInfoPopulator"/>
  <bean id="defaultSAPOrderGenericPaymentInfoPopulator"
      class="de.hybris.platform.commercefacades.order.converters.populator.OrderGenericPaymentInfoPopulator" parent="baseOrderPopulator">
    <constructor-arg name="genericPaymentInfoConverter" ref="sapGenericPaymentInfoConverter"/>

  </bean>

entry.title: Is it possible to create a one Flat Rate for a charge type in Rate Table?
entry.content:
Is it possible to create a one Flat Rate for a charge type in the Rate Table?

We have a scenario if I have multiple line items in FO it should only create one Charge type with a flat rate


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create a one Flat Rate for a charge...
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

You can set up transportation charges using a flat rate for a charge type in a rate table. The rate table allows you to define various parameters such as values, scales, and calculation methods to determine the transportation charges suitable for your needs.

For your requirement, please check the documentations: Rate Determination and Manage Rate Table.

  • You can specify a flat rate for a calculation sheet item by entering an amount and a valid currency.

  • You can specify a relative rate for a calculation sheet line item by specifying a calculation rule and the rates.

    Note that you can specify only one calculation rule at the line-item level and you must specify the calculation rule if you've a relative calculation base as a scale.

  • You can specify that a calculation sheet item is a percentage of another calculation sheet item by entering a percentage value, % as the currency, and a reference line number.

Best regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Use Corporate IDP to access Administration Console of...
entry.content:
Hi

I had the same issue before the user was created in IAS. Once created it works fine.

Check this note also: https://me.sap.com/notes/3507977/E

Make sure your user in EntraID has the correct attributes for the app. i.e if you are using email, the user in entraID needs to have a vlaid email set. you can check attributes passed from EntraID to IAS using SAML-tracer tool in Chrome/Mozilla

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs
entry.content:
@Manimaran - Thank you for the question and Apologies for long response. 😊

SAP BDC has HDLF as the underlying storage mechanism, where data is stored in Delta Tables (Delta data lake concept) and Delta sharing protocol. This approach offers flexibility and scalability by decoupling data storage in object stores from processing, which is cost effective compared to in-memory storage like SAP HANA. SAP Datasphere has DB as HANA Cloud, a powerful in-memory technology, continues to play a central role in processing, ensuring high-performance reporting and analytics. 

The Business Data Cloud (BDC) Foundational Service (FOS) layer leverages a 'zero-copy' approach, utilizing delta share, to allow SAP Datasphere's analytical layer to directly consume data stored within the High-Density Logical File System (HDLFS). This eliminates the need for redundant data copies, akin to accessing a book directly from a library shelf.

However, it's crucial to understand that HDLFS, while efficient for storage and scalability, operates differently from in-memory data storage. Consequently, performance expectations should align with HDLFS characteristics, not the rapid speeds of in-memory processing.

For demanding analytical use cases, particularly operational reporting requiring near real-time data access for immediate insights, SAP Datasphere offers the option to replicate data or utilize view persistency. This allows for enhanced performance when rapid query response times are paramount. Conversely, for tactical reporting, such as analyzing monthly or yearly trends, direct consumption from the HDLFS layer generally provides adequate performance, as the data's age and reporting frequency are less critical.

Furthermore, for strategic reporting, historical analysis, or AI/ML-driven insights, which often involve extensive datasets spanning years or even decades, the choice between direct consumption and replication hinges on the complexity of the analysis and the desired performance levels. In these scenarios, replication might be necessary to optimize query execution times.

Ultimately, the selection of the appropriate data access method—whether direct consumption via zero-copy or replication within Datasphere—boils down to a careful balancing act between storage costs, scalability considerations, and specific business requirements. These requirements encompass factors such as data age, the required performance levels (i.e., query runtime), and the type of analytical reporting being performed. In essence, it's about matching the data access strategy to the unique demands of each analytical task, ensuring optimal performance and cost-effectiveness.

  • Zero-copy (delta share):This means Datasphere can use data directly from its original storage location without creating a full copy. It's like borrowing a book instead of buying it.
  • BDC FOS layer and HDLFS: This is the special storage area where the data lives. It's a type of storage that's good for holding LARGE DATA VOLUME efficiently.
  • In-memory (HANA cloud) vs. HDLFS: In-memory is like having information right on your desk – it's very fast. HDLFS is like having it on a library shelf – it's still accessible, but takes a little longer to get to.
  • Replicate or view persistency in Datasphere from FOS layer: If you need faster access, you can make a copy of the data (replicate) or create a shortcut (view persistency).
  • Operational, tactical, strategic/AI reporting: These are different types of reports. Operational is for real-time stuff, tactical is for trends, and strategic/AI is for long-term analysis.
  • Cost, scalability, and business requirements:
    These are the factors that determine how you access the data. You need to balance how much it costs to store the data, how much data you have, and how quickly you need to access it.

The integration of BDC with Datasphere does not inherently impact performance negatively. In fact, BDC leverages the Datasphere component for data processing services, such as transformation flows, which utilize Spark SQL and Python executed in Spark. This integration allows for efficient data processing and analytics, supporting large-scale data workloads. 

Happy learning, Jeet

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud - FAQs

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Business Partner - Field Enhancement
entry.content:
Hello @Andi_M,
Thank you for this awesome article. 
I did the same as test here and it worked fine. Now I have the requirement to extend one field in BUT050 table. Screen fields are ok, but once I input values on the new "Z" field, values are not saved. I see some differences on CVIS_EI_EXTERN structure. For BUT050 PARTNER_RELATION/ CENTRAL_DATA/ MAIN, When I try to create append on DATA/DATAX, message "structure cannot be enhanced" . Maybe this is the reason or, maybe something is missing in XO-memory customizing. 
Do you have some suggestion? Is it really possible perform this kind of enhancement for BUT050 ( Partner Relationship ) ?
Thanks in advance.
Maria

entry.title: Preview the remote file content from the integrated SAP system
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I am designing an application integrating SAP Build Apps to another SAP system using OData service. I want to fetch the attachment information from a sub-entity - Attachment (Root/Attachment) and open it in the new pop up browser window as attachment preview, no allowing the direct file download.
When I use 'Download Base64 text as file (web only)' logic flow, the attachment is directly downloaded with the Component tap event.
All I want is, to allow only opening of the file from integrated system which will provide me - Binary file Content, file name and mime type.

BR,
Chandan

entry.title: Re: country of origin
entry.content:
Hello @riddhi____12 

As per note 3333620 - Country of origin is not filled in the delivery country of origin is taken from material master if the delivery is import/export relevant.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to deactivate the DRAFT mode for associations of a root entity in Fiori Elements?
entry.content:
I have a root entity in our CAP service, for which I have created a projection in the CAP service and have also activated draft mode there.

Then I created a list and object page in our Fiori Elements app. Everything works quite well so far.

Now I add an association to the entity, which is to be displayed as a table in the object page. This also works. However, this association is now also activated in draft mode. However, this should not be the case, as we are working with final transaction data here and only want to display it.

I have already played around with various annotations, but unfortunately I cannot get this association into read-only mode.

Is there a possibility that you know of? Thank you 🙂

 

service ProcessorService {
    
    @odata.draft.enabled
    entity Cards as
        projection on my.Cards {
            *
        }
}

// db schema
entity Cards : managed {
  key ID               : String; 
      transactions     : Association to many transactions
                           on transactions.card = $self;
  // ... etc
}

entry.title: Re: How to build a document flow in onboarding without preventing the completion of the hiring proce
entry.content: Finally, great to have this flexibility! Thank you @Angela_Romano

entry.title: Re: MDK Filter Action and QuerySpecifier quotes
entry.content: That doesn't seem to be the case. Adding the quotes on the display value makes it actually display quotes at run time in the app, with no change to the behaviour I described. Note that I'm having an issue with the return value, not the display value.

entry.content:
Hello!

I was wondering if I could integrate "Joule as a page" rather than the pop up on clicking the icon into a CAP application that I am working on. Most of the documentations suggest to use Joule Boosters but I can't quite understand it. Any leads would be appreciated.
Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Freight settelment process in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hi  All,

I am new in this area , just trying to understand freight settelment process, does the cost of freight is covered in the sales order invoice or this is seperate from the sales order cost?

entry.title: Re: subcontracting BOM components in PO do not generate r...
entry.content:
Phantom assemblies are used for BOM explosion. They are not stockable, they are not shipped nor planned in MRP. You plan, stock, move and consume the components of the phantom and not the phantom.

Thus their requirements or the phantom assembly itself are not relevant to MRP and normally not even visible in MRP or MD04. In your case you see them in MD04 in a different segment, for planning without final assembly, not relevant for MRP.  Probably caused by a setting of the 'Mixed MRP indicator' (MARC-MISKZ) in the material master, affecting the display in MRP/MD04 even without a matching setting of the planning strategy.

You might want to (re-)consider:

Do you really want to ship the phantom?

Why do you expect MRP to plan it?

Do you really want to plan the phantom with 'planning w/o final assembly' (SAP help describes scenarios where it is useful).

entry.title: Standard fields missing in sales documents data sources
entry.content:
Dear SAP team,

We have the requirement to add to our form template the 'Created by' and 'Changed by' fields to our custom form template. However, when customizing our form templates for Sales documents (contracts, quotes, orders), those fields cannot be found to addition on Adobe LiveCycle Designer.

How can we achieve our requirement?

Best regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Standard fields missing in sales documents data sources
entry.content:
Hello,

In general, if standard fields are not available to addition on the form template, they can be added through a data source extension. By creating a data source extension you extend the standard data source and add standard fields to it, enabling more fields to addition on the form template.

Please refer to the official documentation: How to Extend a Custom Form Template with Standard Fields | SAP Help Portal

If the required fields are not available to be added on the extension, it's suggested to create a custom field.

Kind regards.

Clément

entry.title: SAP GUI Options Local Data -> File Lifetime
entry.content:
Some of our applications are using a "Directory for Documents" path, which is set in SAP GUI Options.

We have to change the path in configuration globally. We do not know how it is set.

We let our admins check Windows-Registry-Editor (regedit) and could not find where this path is set.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Options Local Data -> File Lifetime
entry.content:
Hello!

Thank you for reaching out to the SAP Community channel.

In order to change the path for "Directory for Documents" you need to follow the KBA 3294697 - "Directory for Documents" and "current directory" in SAPGUI is wrong.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Technical Support

entry.title: SAP Ariba Sourcing Event Open for All Suppliers over Internet
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I wanted to check if we have any flexibility to Publish a Sourcing Event in Ariba, take out the link and put it in our website for suppliers. The intent is all the suppliers over the internet who checks our website should be able to view the event, register and participate in the event.

How flexible is it with SAP Ariba Sourcing? Has anyone worked on this kind of scenario in SAP Ariba?

Thanks,
Velu

entry.title: Re: FB02 & FB03 - Details not shown in the Layout field c...
entry.content:
Dear Prabin

To make transaction details visible in the FB02 (Change Document) and FB03 (Display Document) apps in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you have to understand that in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, the traditional SAP GUI transactions like FB02 (Change Document) and FB03 (Display Document) have equivalent SAP Fiori apps. Here are the possible equivalents:

1. **FB02 – Change Document:** The equivalent functionality can be found within the SAP Fiori app called **Manage Journal Entries.** This app allows you to view and edit journal entries similarly to what you would do in FB02.

2. **FB03 – Display Document:** The equivalent functionality can be accessed through the SAP Fiori app called **Display Journal Entry **. This app enables you to view financial documents just like the FB03 transaction.

I suggest you take a look at the documentation for these apps in our SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library.

Below are the links to each APP so you can check if what you are looking for is available in SAP S/4Hana Cloud:

- Manage Journal Entries - New Version 

- Display Journal Entries 

Kind regards.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Error -126 Failed to get license server addres...
entry.content:
Hallo @Fangio_Roegies ,

To fix the SLD connection error you're seeing:

I've had this issue before. Check these thingsMake sure to explicitly set both servers
m_company.SLDServer = "your-sld-server:30000"; // The actual SLD hostname/IP
m_company.LicenseServer = "your-license-server:40000"; // Often same as SLD

The service layer needs both values, even though the client usually gets this automatically. For daemon services specifically, these connections need explicit parameters.

Also check that your firewall isn't blocking those ports and that the SLD service is running on the server.

entry.title: Re: Define request order of initial sync
entry.content:
Thank you for your reply.

I set the options "download_in_order" and "refresh_in_order" to true:

But nothing changed. The initial requests are still in alphabetical order. Do you have any further idea?

entry.title: Re: Need help with X015 and X115 PCRs
entry.content: p.s. : If your WT F102 is to be valued at 100% and nothing else, it would not even justify an entry in V_512W_B (just like most of your other WTs are probably configured) ... but if it goes at 100% in itself and also generates a secondary WT at X% (Val.Basis 2), then a Valuation Basis is justified.

entry.title: Re: How to deactivate the DRAFT mode for associations of a root entity in Fiori Elements?
entry.content: Most likely there is no way. This limitation also exists in RAP. However if I understood your requirements right this shouldn't be some sort of composition and it should be read-only. Could you please share the code?

entry.title: Why do i get error "Object link data not configured" in Manage Documents app ?
entry.content:
Why do i get error "Object link data not configured" in Manage Documents app ?

 

I am getting error while adding BOM & routing in object link in Document management app, where as MARA is working perfectly


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Why do i get error "Object link data not configured"...
entry.content:
In the Manage Documents app , only the following Object Types are allowed

 

    • Material

    • Document info record

    • Equipment

    • Functional location

 

Please refer to the online Documentation at Manage Documents

 

As outlined in the KBA Linking objects is not possible in Fiori - use the classical apps Create or change documents from "Create document" or "Change document" in document handling section instead of manage documents

entry.title: Re: LTMC General maintenance Task List upload
entry.content: thank you, you are right

entry.title: Issue with Query Returning Incorrect Data from MARM Table
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm facing an issue with a query that is supposed to retrieve data from the MARM table, specifically the UMREN field. However, the query consistently returns the value 10, which is incorrect. Below is the code I am using:

DATA: lv_umren_ea TYPE P.
CLEAR lv_umren_ea.
SELECT SINGLE MARM~UMREN
INTO lv_umren_ea
FROM MARM
JOIN MARC ON MARM~MATNR = MARC~MATNR
JOIN CAUFV ON MARC~WERKS = CAUFV~WERKS
  WHERE MARM~MEINH = 'EA'.
Z_EA = lv_umren_ea.

Could anyone help me identify what might be wrong with this code? Any suggestions or insights would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: CDS With Join
entry.content: Hi, i trying to define a view with Join, but the option is not visible on my eclipse workspace. What should i do for the option became visible for me?

entry.title: Re: Default parameter value if tcode is value
entry.content:
In this case you are not trying to modify the selection screen. You are only filling default values.

Use "INITIALIZATION" instead

 

INITIALIZATION.
IF sy-tcode = 'T_CODE'    
    p_param = abap_true.    
ENDIF.

entry.title: is it possible to get an employee`s manager hierarchy count from Success factors Odata ?
entry.content:
I am querying compound employee api, is there a field that shows what an employee`s management hierarchy is ?

i need this to set a process variable for a looping process call so i know how many iterations i have to do for an employee to get all his management chain, because it will change based on if he is a employee or a manager or a senior manager. 

Using SAP CPI for this.

if not possible, then that leaves me with an iterative querying till i get no more managers ?

Any thoughts or recommendations here ?

Regards
Ravi Iyer

entry.title: Delete Document via API on Document Information Extraction
entry.content:
Hello,

I found the section “Delete Document” in the documentation for the API: https://help.sap.com/docs/document-information-extraction/document-information-extraction/delete-document

There it is written that a single document can be deleted if the ID of the document is given:

Unfortunately, this does not work for me as described in the documentation. In my case, all documents are always deleted despite IDs being specified, but I don't want that.

Does anyone here have the same problem or is the problem known?

Thanks for your help

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect EKET, EKES table based on schedule...
entry.content:
AFAIK there is no one-to-one relation between EKES-ETENS (vendor confirmation) and EKET-ETENR (delivery schedule)

  • You can match records with EBELN+EBELP at PO item level
  • Sort EKES by EBELN+EBELP+EINDT or ETENS and EKET by EBELN+EBELP+EINDT or ETENR and then match both extracted data with quantity fields

entry.title: Re: MM-PUR-REQ as software component not available (esh_cockpit)
entry.content: Hi! Did you find a solution?

entry.title: Re: CDS With Join
entry.content:
Those are only templates. You might be confused with some older templates which are now obsolete (DDIC-based views).

But of course you can still do joins in any of those views.

entry.content: What platform and version of MDK are you using?

entry.content:
Hi all,

An example is:  TEST ↗

Thank you in advance and have a good day!

Andreea

entry.title: Re: EKPO showing different ADRNR for single PO, due to wh...
entry.content: Read first a KBA such as 1975508 - Standard filling logic for EKPO-ADRNR and EKPO-ADRN2 - SAP ERP & SAP S/4HANA (KBA suggests to use enhancement MMDA0001 customer-exit EXIT_SAPLMMDA_001 to change standard logic)

entry.title: Dunning procedure works for -1 and 1 days in arrears but not for 0
entry.content:
Hi,

For dunning procedure 1000, we want a line item to be dunned when the due date is 0. When you dun only one line item whose due date is the current day, the system does not dun it. However, if you enter it with a set of documents then the system does it right. In addition, we have tested to claim the line item when it is still one day overdue and when it is already one day overdue, and the system does it well. But when it is due today the following message appears: "highest dys in arrrs 0 smaller than min.arrrs 1-, no dunn.not." For us it does not make sense since it does it right when it is /- 1 due.

entry.title: Error trying to enter the Sap datasphere free trail
entry.content:
I'm trying to access the free trail of sap datasphere but when I log on, after a few seconds it appears that the session has ended and I can't work with SAP Datasphere.After entering the free trail of SAP Datasphere, I got an indication that it is undergoing an update.
Can you explain what it is and how long it lasts?

 

And can you tell me if, because I'm doing a master's thesis, I can ask to have more than 30 days free use of sap datasphere?

entry.title: Re: Default parameter value if tcode is value
entry.content:
You put our code in the PBO, AT SELECTION-SCREEN OUTPUT, so if user press Enter, your code will be executed again, if they uncheck the field and press Execute (F8, F9) their value will be correct, but reset by your code as soon the initial selection-screen is displayed.

  • So move your code to INITIALIZATION or LOAD-OF-PROGRAM block, so code only executed at start

entry.title: Re: SSAM v2310: Property Name ReservationNum missing from...
entry.content: Solution: Reactivate the BC set..

entry.title: ODATA for Financial Document Header - BKPF and line items/segments - BSEG
entry.content:
Hello;

I'm looking for a ODATA service to retreive the financial documents (so the header "table BKPF" and line items/segments  BSEG);


From what I could see:
API_OPLACCTGDOCITEMCUBE_SRV -> Only has the line items; but not the header
API_GLACCOUNTLINEITEM -> Only has the line items; but not the header

 

Could someone please help me out here?

We are in 2023 on prem version.

Thank you!

entry.title: SAP Sales Cloud V2: Reporting Capabilities
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I'm currently exploring the capabilities of SAP Sales Cloud Version 2, particularly regarding reporting.

I'd love to hear your experiences and opinions on:

  1. What key improvements does SAP Sales Cloud V2 offer compared to previous versions in terms of reporting?

  2. What are the main tools or functionalities available for creating advanced reports?

  3. Is there sufficient flexibility to customize reports based on specific business requirements?

  4. Have you integrated SAP Sales Cloud V2 with external analytics tools? How has your experience been?

  5. Is reporting always based on SAP Analytics Cloud, or does SAP Sales Cloud V2 have its own built-in reporting tool?

  6. Are there any predefined reports available that work immediately once connected?

I greatly appreciate any information or advice you can share.

Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: Process Goverannce Issues: One with "Modeler" role an...
entry.content: Thank you Y4Sin. This makes sense.

entry.title: Upload Customer Open Items (Fiori App F4051) --> Missing Field "Trading Partner" (BSEG-VBUND)
entry.content:
Dear experts,
My customer uses the Fiori app “Upload customer open items” (F4051). My customer also uses a validation that requires a Trading Partner No. (BSEG-VBUND) to be entered for certain revenue GL accounts. This validation also applies in this app.
However, the field is not present in the Excel template used for this app. There is no indication in the documentation if and how the field could be added. And the field is also nowhere to be seen in the draft overview after importing.
Is it generally not possible to use this app with the trading partner field? Or do any of you know a possible solution?

Thanks in advance for any advice!
Rado

entry.title: Re: Process Goverannce Issues: One with "Modeler" role an...
entry.content: oops- meant to type more- This makes sense. Because I'm plugging into 1/3 of the trio of things expecting info from the parallel gateway, I moved the arrow to point to the parallel gateway itself, expecting it to kick off all 3. It fails completely at that point, so my assumption is that parallel gateways can't handle more than one path of input? At any rate, I'm just going to throw out the parallel gateways altogether- to me it makes things more compact and fires them all together, but in reality we're likely talking seconds between actions, so no biggy. thanks for your help!

entry.title: Re: Service Order with External Service Procurement
entry.content:
Hello Gert,

I hope you're doing well. Thank you very much for the update on the configuration points.

Indeed, in my service order, I am encountering this type of error after changing my logistics scenario, even though these fields are not present in my service order.

entry.title: Re: MDK Filter Action and QuerySpecifier quotes
entry.content:
Apologies, meant to include that in the original post.
MDKClient Version: 24.11.2-001
Android version 10 (build 10-16-10.00.QG-U79-STD-HEL-04

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content:
Assuming both DEV and TEST are in the same version, I suggest to inspect manually table 'E071` using data browser such as SE16H.

Use columns and values as below
PGMID = R3TR 
OBJECT = CLAS
OBJ_NAME = /UI2/CL_JSON

Column TROKRR will show you all transport requests and tasks with this class (including any one created via SAP Note or via component upgrade). Then you have to check if all those requests were imported to TEST.

entry.title: Re: How to know how the upgrade was done ?
entry.content:
Look for object R3TR CLAS /UI2/CL_JSON in transaction SE03 in both systems.

(if a SAP upgrade, look also at transactions such as SAINT if allowed)

entry.title: SAP for Me: Generative AI Solutioning for Support Knowledge Search
entry.content:
With more than 10+ million knowledge assets across the SAP ecosystem, it can sometimes be difficult to find the information you need. Think: multiple needles, multiple haystacks, in a hurricane. Over the last few years, we've been on a mission to change things. We've put in place a variety of intelligent search features in the frontend, including our support knowledge search, and many more in the backend. These solutions have dramatically improved the ease of finding just the right information.

But gen AI technology gives us an opportunity to do more and do it even better.

Enter our new generative AI search solutioning feature. This latest innovation on SAP for Me finds the most relevant answers to your query from across the SAP knowledge ecosystem—from help documentation to knowledge base articles—and compiles them into a single, concise solution at the top of your knowledge search results.

What is Different?

Our traditional intelligent search uses the keywords in your query, alongside a wide variety of sophisticated techniques and contextual data, to look across SAP knowledge assets to return a list of relevant results.  

With the new generative AI search solutioning enabled, you still benefit from that intelligent search functionality while also gaining the following:

  • Improved traditional search result relevancy.
  • A single, generated solution incorporating information from many different sources at once.
  • A search experience optimized to work with natural language, not just keywords.
  • Peace of mind that a solution generates only when the feature is confident it has understood your query fully and has something useful to reply.

We are also providing you with a few useful functions for feedback and engagement with the feature:

  • Thumbs Up
  • Thumbs Down
  • Copy
  • Toggle On/Off

Improve Your Solutioning Results

To get the best possible results from generative AI search solutioning, use natural language and context to make your query specific and clear.

For example, an ideal query might be, “Why did I get a SOAP class error message when creating an RFQ?” This query not only uses natural language but also provides context about what happened, when, and where. The answer that generates is very useful:

In comparison, the search “SOAP class error” may not generate a solution at all. If it does, the reply might not be specific enough to answer the query fully without additional refinement or research:

Intelligent search and knowledge teams are always learning. If no answer generated for you fifteen minutes ago, it might just generate now! Knowledge emerges and evolves constantly across the SAP ecosystem, and on average, we log thousands of interactions with that knowledge during every minute of every day. This mountain of data changes how the search behaves from one moment to the next.

When Will This Feature Be Live?

Soon! We are just wrapping up our final testing and plan to deploy the feature to SAP for Me in late Q1 or early Q2.

entry.title: Re: Coming Up: Change in Preparation Plan for C_S4CFI
entry.content: Hello, please do not worry. If you book your exam while the current version is available, your exam will base on the current content, even after April 1st. But if you book your exam after the current version has been retired, this means you book the new version with the new content. So please make sure you book your exam soon. I hope this helps. Best regards, Doris.

entry.title: BOP job unconfirming orders
entry.content: I have a variant setup for a BOP job and I am running it twice everyday, the morning job unconfirms few orders in the first run and the evening job confirms the same order running with the same job variant. I have made sure no other planning run is running on the same time in morning but I still see this issue happening everyday, request to suggest.

entry.title: Re: Service Order with External Service Procurement
entry.content:
When I switch to English, some words in my error message remain in French, sorry...                           

Début pér.valid = Start of validity period       and        Fin validité = End of validity

entry.title: Re: Gantt Chart in SAP UI5 - Drag and Drop functionality between 2 Charts
entry.content:
Hello, does anybody know how to enable or how to config Drag and Drop for 2 gantt charts in the same container or if it even is possible? i'm trying to drag a shape from the bottom chart to the top to be able to create a shift with the data from the dragged shape but it never triggers the drop event.
I tried with sap.ui.core.dnd.DragDropConfig programatically and through the view, im trying right now using the external jquery lib but nothing seems to work.

If somebody is able to help me and is in need of more info i can provide it.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: How to deactivate the DRAFT mode for associations of a root entity in Fiori Elements?
entry.content: @FabioPagoti I added the code sample.. that's basically all we have at the moment. The card object is the root object which could be edited but the transactions should be fixed and just show some more context/informations

entry.title: Acquisitions and Preparation Consolidation Group Changes
entry.content:
Hi aIl,

I'm seeking guidance on SAP's best practices for managing a new acquisition:

considering that data for the full Balance Sheet (BS) should be loaded starting from Central Finance (CFIN) during the period preceding the first consolidation and subsequently released to Group Reporting (GR) for full consolidation. The full trail balance (BS + PL) has to be loaded in the month of acquisition in CFIN, then run the Release Universal journal and all the task of the monitors. The Preparation Consolidation Group Changes tasks should automatically move all the BS balances to subitem 901 for incoming units  and the PL as well to Balance Sheet but it doesn't seem to work out.

Am I overlooking something? Is there anyone who can advise on the topic?

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM and Tricentis TTA - SAP Standard Test scenario's for SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
entry.content:
Hi,

Are there built-in Test-scenario's within Tricentis testing tool (for SAP Cloud ALM), so automated testing and reporting can be setup really easily? This is available for SAP S/4Public cloud, what are the options in SAP S/4HANA Private cloud? 

If yes, in which tool of Tricentis, and how does it looks like? I'm working right now with Tricentis TTA (via SAP Cloud ALM). Let me know thanks in advance.

KR


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM and Tricentis TTA - SAP Standard Test s...
entry.content:
The SAP Cloud ALM Integrating Test Automation Providers documentation states that SAP Cloud ALM currently supports integration with 2 Test Automation Providers. They are: 

  1. Test automation tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  2. Tricentis Test Automation for SAP integrated with SAP Cloud ALM

The "Test Automation" tool for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition offers pre-packaged automated tests based on the "SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" SAP Activate Roadmap. These tests are pre-packaged in the test automation provider ("Test Automation" tool) itself, not in SAP Cloud ALM. SAP Cloud ALM supports the use of the "SAP Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition" SAP Activate Roadmap, so those automated tests can be imported into SAP Cloud ALM. 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition does not provide a Test Automation tool containing pre-packaged automated tests based on any SAP Activate Roadmaps. Tricentis Test Automation can be used to create and manage your automated tests for your products linked to SAP Cloud ALM, including SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition. Your SAP Cloud ALM tenant can then be used to trigger and report on the automated tests. However, Tricentis does not currently come with any pre-packaged tests for SAP products. Users will need to manually create the Automated Tests in Tricentis, so that SAP Cloud ALM can run and report on them.

entry.title: Re: VIP Virtual Program – Strategic Product Roadmap Update H1 2025 (AMER/EMEA)

entry.title: Re: Download button for Bonus Assignment statement in Peo...
entry.content:
Hi @S0026446342 ,

Checking the List of Role-Based Permissions, I think the role-based permissions you need to grand to the users who need to download VRP Bonus Assignment statement is:

Please, Navigate to “Manage Permission Roles” , select the role associated with the users needing access and check if the role has the permission name “Download bonus assignment statement”

I hope above information helps you

Best regards

Alejandro

Thank you very much in advance, 
Mell

entry.title: File Upload from sap gui base transaction in Fiori Launchpad use Z:\temp file path
entry.content:
Hi,

I've created a Fiori App based in a SAP GUI transaction and now is displayed in Fiori Launchpad, when I want to upload an excel file from C:\ It sets file path as z:\temp\file name.xlsx, so file can´t be procesed because It can´t be found in z:\.

In SAP Gui transaction works fine.

This is how It´s shown in Fiori App:

I'm using the next function to upload file: CALL METHOD cl_gui_frontend_services=>file_open_dialog 

How can I solve this...? I've seen a post where this problem is solved using GUI_UPLOAD but It didn´t work for me.

Thanks on advance.

Regards.

entry.title: Multidimensional Analysis a Stepstone to modern Reporting in S/4HANA CE2502
entry.content:
Introduction 

Fiori Applications evolve step-by-step to enable embedded Analytics and operational reporting.
They become more and more insightful consuming multidimensional data based on analytical queries and new analytical controls in UI5.
This Modernization of Reporting in S/4HANA is driven by new Review Booklet and Multidimensional Analysis Apps based on new Dragonfly Libraries in UI5.
Common Standard Reports can be delivered out-of the Box, simple to consume, realtime without additional installations or efforts.

You might have seen the earlier blogs in the last S/4HANA Cloud Release CE2408.

Review Booklet Designer - Concepts and Adaptability in S/4HANA CE2408 
Highlights in Review Booklet in S/4HANA CE2408 

With this blog we continue the story of Embedded Analytics contributing powerful reporting apps, which support easy consumption in Fiori Apps, provide answers to relevant business questions, combined with drill-downs and aggregation of multidimensional data. At the same time we bring Analytics within Fiori closer to SAP Analytics Cloud, where you will find the same user experience, dialogs and features both in Fiori and SAC Data analyzer.

In this blog you will learn more about this new type of Multidimensional Analysis Apps and what they can do for you in your daily business in S/4HANA Cloud Edition 2502 but also for future releases. In case you prefer a video Please watch the recording of our Early Release Series Video for S/4HANA Cloud Edition CE2505

Let's first clarify the main prerequisites:

  1. We are in S/4HANA public cloud and those multidimensional reporting capabilities are contributed by the ABAP Cloud Platform. This makes it easy in future releases to provide similar capabilities also in private cloud.
  2. The data access is managed by the ABAP Analytic Engine, which uses the meta data of analytical queries to aggregate and present the data in a multidimensional format.
  3. Review Booklets and Multidimensional analysis are Fiori applications, which leverage analytical controls in UI5.
  4. This enables those apps to access realtime data, deliver Review Booklet and Multidimensional Apps out of the box. Leveraging the same user experience and security concepts known in the context of Fiori.
  5. There is no additional license required.

Use Cases from Business and Key User Perspective

Looking at the use cases you will find new categories of  Fiori Applications which consume multidimensional data.

  1. There are Review Booklets with multiple guided pages allowing you to adress typical business questions. Those empower the business user with predefined layouts, features and navigations.
    Those layouts serve as starting point for detailed drill-downs.

  2. In more generic and very simple cases we offer a generic pivoting App, which offers the same multidimensional layouting side panel for drill-downs and layout adaptation in one page.

  3. Commenting can be used in cases where the underlying CDS models foresee a document store.
    At the moment this still has to be prepared and delivered by SAP Inhouse Development.
    Those commenting side panels can then be used in Review Booklet and Multidimensional Analysis Apps.

  4. As you might expect we are working heavily on AI Use cases, which extend the guided pages with augmented insights provided by Large Language Models. At the moment major part of these innovations are in beta and require the activation of feature toggles.

  5. Finally this insights can be shared via multiple ways, such as Teams, E-mail or sharing individual comments.

This concludes the Business User Perspective:

Nevertheless we are aware that ideally customers want to copy the predefined reporting assets and adapt them as easy as possible to their needs. This is done by a Key User or Developer.
For these parts of custom reporting we use the App: "Manage KPI and Reports", which is enriched by a new Review Booklet Tab as well as a Tab for Multidimensional Reports.
Key Users can create and adapt Review Booklets and/or create Multidimensional Apps.
The process of publishing such a App, creating a tile and assigning those apps to a business catalog stays unchanged.

 

Functional Perspective on Multidimensional Analysis 

In this blog we now want to elaborate on the different features offered by the Multidimensional Analysis App. 
Looking at the available features you will find capabilities and side panels for:

  1. Filtering your data you can use the filter bar with dedicated variables, but you can also add dynamic Filters on any dimension on the fly.
  2. The layout side panel allows you to bring any dimension, measure or structure to rows and columns as needed.
  3. The layout content can also be used to create simple charts to visualize your numbers.
  4. In case commenting is supported in your underlying CDS Models (Analytical Queries and Cubes) you will see a commenting side panel allowing you to annotate certain cells with additional explanations.
  5. Furthermore you can leverage contextual navigation or conditional formatting to further explain or highlight relevant data.


 Multidimensional Analysis in Action (Demo Perspective)

Let's now illustrate these features in a demo example to make this app more tangible for you:

Getting Started

We have created a custom MDA App based on a new "Analytical Query", which was published via Manage KPI and Reports.  Do achieve the same you have to do the following steps:

  1. Create or Identify a custom Analytical Query, which you want to use (use the Fiori App F1572A - Custom Analytical Queries and Services)
  2. Open Manage KPI and Reports (Fiori App F2814) and navigate to the Tab Multidimensional Reports.
  3. Here you can create your custom Multidimensional Analysis App and Publish your Tile and Application.
  4. Once have assigned your App to a Custom Catalog you can assign it to your user and your ready to go.
    Of course you will also find more and more SAP delivered Multidimensional Analysis Apps in future.

 

Please find a Video illustrating the key user steps in more detail within our sap.help.com documentation:
Create a custom Multidimensional Analysis App (from Key User Perspective) 

Starting your Analysis

In this example the related multidimensional analysis app is assigned to the Overhead_Accountant.
He can now leverage predefined public or private views known from any other Fiori App or he can select the data via variables/filter fields  offered in the filter bar in red or he can choose to refine the data adding dynamic filters.

The new value-help offers a lot of flexibility to add conditions such as intervals or excludes:

Refining your Layout

The main idea of multidimensional analysis is to offer generic pivoting features allowing you to place dimensions, measures and structures on rows and columns. See the related side panel below:

But you will find many more features such as "Add Calculations", Sorting, conditional formatting etc. in the related side panels.

Let's finally have a look at the simple charting capabilities, which help you to illustrate the data:

Please have a look at the following video in help.com from Business User Perspective
Multidimensional Analysis from Business User Perspective 

App Contexts to find and use Multidimensional Analysis

Let's finally answer the question, where will you be able to use the new Multidimensional Analysis App in S/4HANA Cloud Edition:

First of all you will be able to use MDA as a business user in cases, where SAP delivered such an app as part of the standard delivery, but already today you can share custom MDA Apps already within Manage KPI and Reports. See our Demo Example.

Furthermore you will find the same MDA App in the context of the new Query Designer as preview or as preview within Manage KPI and Reports. Also the new Review Booklet Designer allows you to preview an analytical query. Last but not least you are also able to preview custom developed analytical queries in  ABAP Development Tools within Steampunk.

To Summarize

S/4HANA has done another big step to modernize embedded Analytics within S/4HANA Public cloud.
Nevertheless the multidimensional analysis App is only one part of the story. The multidimensional analysis apps represent more the technology side of the medal. Based on this technology new Fiori App will evolve, which answer the typical business questions in guided layouts within so-called Review Booklets.
Meaningful layouts, commenting, AI techniques in combination with the Review Booklet Designer add insightful and adaptable concepts first in the public cloud but also in the private cloud in future.
Thanks for your attention - stay tuned for more.

entry.title: Re: Best Practice for SAML Offline generator and local keystore with SAP SuccessFactors
entry.content: Hello @DanielleMariano - you may not have full read access to KBAs, as the attachment is definitely there, I just checked (our hotline, Customer Interaction Center, may be able to assist with your permissions, their contact details are in https://me.sap.com/notes/560499)

entry.title: Re: API Sales Order (A2X) - Response
entry.content:
By definition, an OData API will return the whole entity after a document was created.

So, imagine you call the create request using something similar

POST /SalesOrder

{
"customer": "1234",
"sales_organization": "0100",
"channel": "0100",
"division": "0100"
"Items": [

]
}

So what you get in return assuming you get a 201 (Create successful) is actually the whole SalesOrder entity (including any fields generated in the back end)

POST /SalesOrder

{
"id": "40001",
"created_by": "USER_ABC",
"created_on": "some date",
"customer": "1234",
"sales_organization": "0100",
"channel": "0100",
"division": "0100",
"Items": [

]
}
​

In order to understand all fields available in the API for any entity, you can always call the $metadata endpoint of the API as you can also do for any OData API.

GET /sap/opu/xxxxx/service_srv/$metadata 
(do not include an entity name in the url)
